message:
test(lexical-publish): add kill/relaunch atomic publish recovery e2e [mux5k]

New Linux-only E2E test that spawns cass index --full --force-rebuild,
waits for the CASS_TEST_LEXICAL_PUBLISH_KILL_RELAUNCH_SENTINEL gate
(process paused after atomic swap + canonical sidecar park), SIGKILLs
the child, relaunches cass, and verifies:
- canonical sidecar survives the crash
- recovery finalizes the interrupted backup on restart
- search returns results post-recovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
